critical_code_review_comments: InvoiceModal.js: Well-structured component with inline styles for print compatibility
COMPANY constant (lines 4-12): Correctly defines company details including GSTIN 27AAQCP6686E1ZR and HSN 998314
GST calculation (lines 47-53): Correctly splits 18% GST into 9% CGST and 9% SGST
Print functionality (lines 56-106): Opens new window with styled invoice for printing
data-testid attributes present: invoice-modal, invoice-print-btn, invoice-close-btn, view-invoice-btn

success_rate.frontend: 100% (8/8 invoice tests passed, 1/1 regression test passed)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user with PRC-based subscription payment
context_for_next_testing_agent: Invoice feature fully implemented at /app/frontend/src/components/InvoiceModal.js. View Invoice button appears in Transaction History for paid payments (data-testid='view-invoice-btn'). Invoice modal shows company header, Bill To, Description table with HSN 998314, GST breakdown (9% CGST + 9% SGST), Total, PAID badge, and Print button. Test user has 1 PRC-based subscription payment visible. PRC Collect on Mining page working correctly.
